title: VIP
description: Enjoy beautiful views with realistic terrain and majestic shaders. Battle dragons, build factories, and cook delicious meals.
body:
**Performance-optimised version available here: [VIP (Performance Preset)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vip-5-lite)**

Focussing on a balance of realism, industry, and fantasy, this pack adds food mods, engineering mods, and unique terrain generation mods to the game.

Play with or without beautiful Eclipse shaders and distant horizons (for crazy render distance).

**Main mods included:**

- Lithosphere + Still Life
- Sodium + Iris + Eclipse Shaders + Distant Horizons
- Better Combat + Tinker's Construct
- Create + Steam and Rails (no aeronautics sadly)
- Ice and Fire + Alex's Mobs
- Farmer's Delight + Cooking for Blockheads

**Performance:**

This pack has two presets: Shader, and Performance. Both presets use the same mods, but have their graphical settings adjusted for aesthetics and framerate respectively. Reach out for help with performance.
